title: Can you spot which committed file explains this mismatch?
summary: Google for Developers presents a package management puzzle where local development and CI environments install the same dependency but end up with different versions despite unchanged package.json. The puzzle invites viewers to identify which committed file explains the version mismatch based on how the install is being resolved.
